sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44822" key="eu)/polis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔπολις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44822.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abounding in cities</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
